# Copilot Instructions

## Project: Data Science Portfolio Website

A modern, production-level portfolio website for a Data Science & AI student.

### Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js 14+ (App Router), React, TailwindCSS
- **Animations**: Framer Motion
- **UI**: Glassmorphism, dark/light theme toggle
- **Deployment**: Vercel-ready

### Completed Steps
- [x] Scaffold Next.js project
- [x] Install dependencies (TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, next-themes, react-icons, react-hook-form)
- [x] Build all portfolio sections (Hero, About, Projects, Skills, Certifications, Contact, Blog)
- [x] Configure dark/light theme
- [x] SEO metadata setup
- [x] README and deployment instructions

### Development Rules
- Use App Router (`app/` directory)
- Keep components modular inside `components/`
- Use TailwindCSS utility classes only (no custom CSS unless needed)
- Framer Motion for all animations
- `next-themes` for dark/light toggle
- All placeholder content should be clearly marked with comments
